title: Non-record: Internal control port on the PR180 stack
author: small-cactus

data.description: Ports a late-attention internal-control method onto the PR180 stack, applying control on top of the existing recipe rather than replacing it.
Detached gate-controlled attention scaling to modulate attention with control gates.
EMA-zscore energy normalization with clipping to stabilize the control signal.
Compile-path fixes to prevent the recurrent control path from blowing up graph size in the public script.
Fast iteration support for public-track debugging, including capped validation for smoke runs and eval progress logging.

novel_contributions: Late-attention internal control ported onto the PR180 stack
Detached gate-controlled attention scaling with gate_fuse_mode=k
Compile-path fixes for recurrent control to keep the public script runnable on multi-GPU pods
Fastcheck/debug support with capped validation and eval progress logging
